name: folio
// type: ESM, so Vercel compiles api/index.ts as an ES module. Without this it defaults to CommonJS and require()ing the ESM server throws ERR_REQUIRE_ESM at runtime — a failure that only appears once deployed.
description: Folio — a student notebook. Notion x Obsidian x Google Docs, local-first, AI-powered.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
